report.title: UKSI taxon names for TanHub
report.description: A list of UKSI taxon names for TanHub.
report.query: -- We want to return all taxon names, for the correct list, that allow data entry and where the preferred name is in one of the configured ranks. -- Include taxon names for any taxon group, as long as it is a parent of one of the taxon names for one of the configured groups. WITH all_ttlids AS ( SELECT DISTINCT cttl.id FROM cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttlc JOIN cache_taxon_paths ctp ON ctp.taxon_meaning_id=cttlc.taxon_meaning_id JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.taxon_meaning_id=ANY(ctp.path) AND cttl.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id# AND cttl.preferred=true AND cttl.allow_data_entry=true AND cttl.taxon_rank IN (#taxon_ranks#) WHERE cttlc.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id# AND cttlc.allow_data_entry=true #filters# ) SELECT #columns# FROM cache_taxa_Taxon_lists cttl WHERE cttl.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id IN (SELECT id FROM all_ttlids) AND cttl.allow_data_entry=true AND cttl.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id#

param.name: taxon_list_id
param.description: ID of the taxon list to load taxa for.

param.name: taxon_ranks
param.description: Ranks of the taxa to load, quoted CSV.

param.name: taxon_group_ids
param.description: Optional taxon groups of the taxa to load, comma separated IDs.
